title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama project: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Install via pip install ollama and chat with local models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’). Comparable to ChatGPT interface.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Maven central artifact lets JVM apps chat with local models.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama. Idiomatic Tokio-based client with serde models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by Ollama models running locally.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal Next.js chat app that streams answers from Ollama over the REST API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with readline history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-nest
summary: Official NestJS module that injects an Ollama service into your Node back-end.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer-backed process management for fault-tolerant chats.
